Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Continued To Dec-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for petitioner.
Maria del Carmen Reynozo in propria persona.
Karla Felix (Carmen's niece) in propria persona.

The court noted that the services of a Spanish interpreter were not available, spoke of what occurred at the last hearing and noted that Maria del Carmen was given until today to file her objections, but nothing was filed and stated that it is inclined to grant the petition today, but that it will order a bond. Maria del Carmen stated that she respects that the father left everything to the daughter, that she is asking that her daughter leave her alone and to give her what is rightfully hers, that there are problems in the house, that children should not be in the house and that she does not have any money for a lawyer. Mr. Wrobel asked the court not to order bond, stated that bond is waived in the will, that the petitioner is the sole beneficiary and that Maria del Carmen's rights are protected because she is 50% owner of the property and is on title, that Maria del Carmen lives in Mexico and that his client lives in the home and runs a day care there. The court noted that will does not provide for Maria del Carmen other than her community property share. Mrs. Felix spoke of the family dynamics and the family disputes and stated that Maria del Carmen had to get a restraining order against the daughter. Mr. Wrobel suggested mediation. The court stated that mediation is not appropriate at this point and advised the parties of the June 21st hearing date in Dept. 403. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 26, 2023, is admitted to probate. Ruth Reynozo is appointed as the Executor of the estate with will full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for May 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Continued To Jun-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Ruth Reynozo (petitioner).
Carmen Reynozo (spouse of the decedent) in propria persona.
Alfredo Salazar (nephew of Carmen) in propria persona for the purpose of assisting his aunt.

Mrs. Reynozo indicated that she is objecting and that she can not afford to hire an attorney. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to June 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Reynozo is to file her objections in writing by May 28, 2024. The court is requesting the services of a Spanish speaking interpreter to assist Mrs. Reynozo.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.
